title: Aurovedic Palm Reading @ 12 in 1986 - Some things turned out to be true

enrichment.summary: Kyle plays an old recording from 1986 when he was 12 years old, featuring an Ayurvedic palm reading session where a reader analyzes his hands and makes predictions about his personality, future career, relationships, and life path.
enrichment.speaker: other

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle accidentally hit the record button on the video camera and now has to splice the footage.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer is the kind of person who needs constant new stimuli and gets bored quickly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer is sensitive, talented, and prefers to let others showcase their talents while they watch.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer is a great host and communicator, making them good at throwing parties.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer would excel as a psychiatrist or psychologist because they give good advice.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer would dislike working as a clerk or salesman and prefers a job with higher purpose.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer is interested in money and plans to become wealthy through their own efforts.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer is a wonderful artist and often engages in music, singing to themselves but not with others.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer is shy and uncomfortable singing as a human but would be wonderful as an angel.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer, who is around 12 years old, is wondering what they will do when they grow up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer is unhappy because they don’t want the same things everyone else wants for them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer is tuned in and receives messages from people even if they’re not speaking English.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer and their brother are both exceedingly smart but may compete with each other.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer is quick to get the last word in and is powerful and aggressive.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer’s competition with their brother stems from a desire to protect or love their mom the most.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer’s mom has an impractical nature, which the viewer has noticed but loves about her.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer is worried about their future and whether they will be strong or powerful.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer may want to be a bodybuilder, weightlifter, or Olympian and will have a great reputation.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer doesn’t like to work and would prefer someone to give them money rather than earn it themselves.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer has a dry sense of humor and sometimes makes jokes at the wrong time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer’s cold and fever activity is related to needing attention from their father.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer is born in a water year and enjoys swimming laps with goggles but not casual swimming.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer wants to compete and be an Olympian, possibly in bicycle racing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer and their brother do a lot of traveling, possibly separately.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer will be a ladies man when they grow up and will marry around age 26 or 27.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer’s future wife will have a lot of power over them and they will have several kids.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer will accumulate a lot of money through their own creative efforts.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer could be a writer or engage in a creative profession related to bicycle racing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer and their brother could be a team in international bicycle racing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer is angry about something, possibly an obstacle they’re trying to overcome.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer is rich and successful but not particularly famous, which is okay with them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer is enlightened and very aware, which may make it hard for others to understand them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer is afraid to leave home and prefers being taken care of.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer and their brother have guardian angels who are wrathful and protective.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer will live a long life and spend a lot of time outside the country.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer has a sensitive and artistic nature, possibly resembling Merlin the wizard.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer wants to be peaceful and loves being around water in this life.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer wants to help people overcome negative thoughts but first needs to help themselves.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer spends a lot of time daydreaming, which could lead to inventions.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer wishes they were stronger physically and could visualize themselves as strong.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer needs church, prayer, or ritual work for spiritual growth.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer could train people or build bicycles as part of their career.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer and their brother will both be very successful in life.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer is happy on the outside but not on the inside and is trying hard to make something happen.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer wanted to die when they were five years old but finds life tolerable now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer’s sadness will gradually improve and get better by age 21.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer needs to control their mind and engage in contemplation, possibly by water.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes the viewer is too emotional and attaches to old things that send them down crazy roads.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks the viewer is artistic with their thoughts and can weave stories all day long.
